footer.companyBlurb: Abadis Tejarat Arka is building a multilingual, inquiry-led public catalog for B2B sourcing conversations across products, categories, and manufacturers.
footer.localePolicy: Public locale foundation: English and French. Persian remains modeled but non-public for MVP.
footer.pricingPolicy: Pricing remains informational only. Products without a public price must route users toward direct contact.

home.title: Foundation for a serious multilingual B2B catalog, built around products, manufacturers, and inquiry-driven conversion.
home.description: Phase 1 establishes the app architecture, route map, design token layer, locale boundaries, and admin protection required for the finalized ATA specification package.
home.heroPanelTitle: ATA brand foundations are now encoded in the live scaffold.
home.heroPanelBody: The palette, typography, and shell direction follow the ATA CRM audit while deliberately avoiding dashboard-first public composition.
trustPoints: Locale-prefixed public routes for English and French from day one.
Persian modeled in architecture while staying non-public and non-indexable.
Protected admin shell prepared for structured CMS workflows.
home.foundationTitle: App scaffolding, brand tokenization, admin protection, and locale architecture are in place.
home.foundationBody: The next implementation steps connect this foundation to the finalized Prisma schema, publication rules, seed data, and content-managed public pages.

about.title: Company page scaffold
about.body: This route exists with the correct locale-aware structure and metadata shape. It will be connected to CMS-managed page content in the next phase.
about.note: The underlying architecture separates language-neutral page identity from per-locale translation content, matching the specification package.

products.title: Product index scaffold
products.body: The public product index route is live and ready for the catalog listing, filtering, and CTA patterns defined in the wireframes.
products.note: Phase 2 activates the schema, relationships, and admin flows that will replace scaffold copy with managed product data.

categories.title: Hierarchy-aware category routing
categories.body: Category routes are prepared for localized multi-level paths from the start, avoiding the common retrofit problem described in the docs.
categories.note: The detail route already accepts nested segments so the localized hierarchy path cache can drive public URLs cleanly.

manufacturers.title: Manufacturer-aware routing
manufacturers.body: Manufacturers are treated as first-class public catalog entities, not a hidden lookup table or a reseller placeholder.
manufacturers.note: Phase 2 will connect these routes to related product data and locale-specific manufacturer profiles.

contact.title: Contact and inquiry route
contact.body: The contact path is reserved for a trustworthy B2B inquiry flow. It will later persist requests directly in the application database without paid dependencies.
contact.note: The final flow will store locale context, source-page context, and linked product or manufacturer information where applicable.
